name: stockyard-llmcache
description: Intelligent LLM response caching. Exact-match caching with configurable TTL. Reduces costs and latency for repeated prompts.

tools.name: cache_stats
tools.description: Get cache hit/miss statistics. Shows hit rate, total entries, and estimated savings.

tools.name: cache_flush
tools.description: Clear the entire cache or cache entries matching a pattern.

tools.name: cache_set_ttl
tools.description: Change the cache TTL (time-to-live) for new entries.

tools.name: cache_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the CacheLayer proxy is running and healthy.
